title: Medieval-Craft 2.0
description: A Rework of the Original Medieval-Craft. The Texture size is gonna be: 64x64. More High Quality, which means more time, but better textures.
body:
# Chu-Index Presents: Medieval-Craft 2.0!
- So basically, this is a 64x Version of Medieval-Craft but it's also a remake because of the bug fixes were impossible, and 1.21.6 is no longer a version. 1.21.7+ is the new version. Some day I'll make it for OLDER versions, but for now. 1.21.7+ Basically it makes it look more Medieval-Like than the Original.


<details>
<summary>2.0 Features</summary>

> - Retextures Minecraft to feel more Medieval
> 
> - Go's from 16x to 64x! THAT IS 4X AS MANY PIXELS!
> 
> - Actaully being updated more than Medieval-Craft (OG) now in the form of "Drops" (like Minecraft)

</details>

Hopefully you like 2.0 MORE than the Original. But it still feels nostalgic. Download it too if you don't want high quality! -> [Medieval-Craft (Medieval 16x + Moved!)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/m16x)
